allow_instructions: Allow read-only git inspections such as git status, git diff, and git log when they do not modify state.
Allow read-only file searches and documentation reads inside this workspace.
block_instructions: Block git commit, push, pull, merge, rebase, reset --hard, and clean unless the Operator explicitly approved that exact action.
Block wrangler deploy, production access, secret mutation, and database or KV migrations.
Block any command that prints or uploads .dev.vars, .env files, or credential material.
Block PR create/modify and remote GitHub mutations unless the Operator explicitly approved that exact action.
Block Corps mcp-grid claim_packet, complete_packet, and submit_packet unless the Operator explicitly authorized packet execution.
